_description: Name templates for in-world locations, objects, and points of interest the player encounters. TODO: Full implementation.
_design_notes: Stations and ports: Named by function or by the culture that built them
Ships: Player ship names, NPC ship names, derelict names — each with different flavor
Bars and gathering places: Where encounters happen — names set atmosphere
Cargo and trade goods: What you carry, what you find
Artifacts and anomalies: The weird things at the edges
Signals and transmissions: What you hear in deep space
_todo: Expand with: generation rules for each category, culture-specific variants, rarity tiers for trade goods, artifact naming system tied to the ancient layer
